# coolify_task_executions (Data Source)

Lists all executions for a scheduled task on an application or service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List task executions for an application
data "coolify_task_executions" "app_task" {
  application_uuid = "your-app-uuid"
  task_uuid        = "your-task-uuid"
}

output "app_task_statuses" {
  value = [for e in data.coolify_task_executions.app_task.executions : e.status]
}

# List task executions for a service
data "coolify_task_executions" "svc_task" {
  service_uuid = "your-service-uuid"
  task_uuid    = "your-task-uuid"
}

output "svc_task_statuses" {
  value = [for e in data.coolify_task_executions.svc_task.executions : e.status]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `task_uuid` (String) The UUID of the scheduled task.

### Optional

- `application_uuid` (String) The UUID of the application. Exactly one of `application_uuid` or `service_uuid` must be provided.
- `service_uuid` (String) The UUID of the service. Exactly one of `application_uuid` or `service_uuid` must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `executions` (Attributes List) The list of task executions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--executions))

<a id="nestedatt--executions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `executions`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `message` (String) The output message of the execution.
- `status` (String) The status of the execution.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the execution.
